label: Quartermaster's Bunkroom
description: Quartermaster's Bunkroom constitutes a compact sleeping chamber set behind the Basalt Arsenal’s low-glare showroom, enclosed in salt-cemented stone and matte baffle panels that suppress reflection. A built-in cot and lockers are recessed into basalt niches, their hardware oversized and cross-braced to match the structure’s stress-rated joinery. Narrow, shuttered vents admit mineral-laden air without admitting direct Saltharrow glare, while a sealed washstand and drain channel manage saline dust. The room’s fittings remain austere and standardized, consistent with regulated storage practices in Brineshade Terminator City.
